title: Habit Tracker Spreadsheet Template
summary: Generate and export a custom habit tracker CSV in minutes, then copy/save or move to a paid workbook flow.
selection_rule: Prefer a verified source-first link for established templates, then use the DayOneBuilder generator for a custom no-signup path.

entries.title: Habit Tracker Spreadsheet Template
entries.first_action: Open the page, paste habits in `habit, times/week, minutes` format, set weeks, and click Build tracker template.
entries.smoke_test: Build at least one template, copy CSV or download it, and confirm output has habit_name, target_per_week, and week columns.
entries.proof_signal: Qualified completion and export events are logged from local actions; no signup required; official template sources are linked for trust evidence.
entries.fallback: If you prefer a prebuilt spreadsheet, use Vertex42 or SpreadsheetClass as linked from the page before exporting your copy.
entries.adoption_metric: organic click, qualified completion, copy/download, paid offer click, checkout start

fallback: If this page is not usable for your habits, open one of the linked public template sources and adapt the format manually.
